headline: Oil briefly hits $119 and Europe gas prices surge after attacks on energy facilities in Qatar, Iran
summary: Oil prices jumped as markets react to escalating tensions after Qatar said Iranian missile strikes damaged a key liquefied natural gas export facility.

headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session

headline: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
summary: Consumers are seeing fuel prices rapidly rise as the Iran war has triggered the biggest oil supply disruption in history.

headline: Trump waives U.S. shipping law for 60 days to steady oil market
summary: The Trump administration "remains committed to continuing to strengthen our critical supply chains" amid the Iran war, press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

headline: Cuba partially restores power as President Díaz-Canel vows ‘unyielding resistance’ to U.S. oil blockade
summary: The communist-run island nation is thought to be facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union amid a U.S. oil blockade.
